dense_en: A man with short black hair neatly side parted, a high forehead with slight recession at the temples, a broad face with a full jawline, medium to light skin tone, and rectangular dark framed eyeglasses. He has broad shoulders, a broad slightly thick stocky torso, and a regular to heavyset build. He wears a dark charcoal wool knee length pea coat with lapels and a double breasted overlapped front, with a medium blue collared shirt showing at the neckline, dark straight leg trousers, and brown shoes that can read dark with lighter soles in some lighting. He also carries a black backpack, marked by a dark diagonal crossbody strap running from shoulder to opposite hip, and commonly keeps one hand in his coat pocket while walking with a long stride.

A young man with short black hair combed back with a neat side part, rectangular dark framed eyeglasses, and medium to light skin tone. He wears a light blue collared shirt at the neckline over a dark inner shirt.

A slim woman with narrow shoulders and long dark hair worn loose, wearing light colored mid thigh outerwear with a straight hem over a dark inner top at the chest opening. A dark scarf is draped around her neck and upper chest, paired with dark fitted pants and dark ankle boots, and she carries a large bright pink handbag at her side.

A man with short black hair with fuller volume on top and closely trimmed at the sides and back, a rounded face, medium light skin tone, a regular build, and moderately broad shoulders. He also carries a large black backpack with broad shoulder straps, a top carry handle, a central vertical zip section with dangling zipper pulls, multiple front compression straps, a bungee style front, and small bright green accent details on the back panel. In another supported outfit within the same group, he has an office worker look in a dark blazer coat over a dark crew neck top, with a blue lanyard and ID badge at the chest.

A fair skinned young man with a slim face, narrow jawline, and round metal eyeglasses, wearing straight dark medium length hair with slightly tousled volume on top and the hood up over his head. He has a slim build with relatively narrow shoulders and long legs. He wears a dark hooded puffer jacket with horizontal quilted baffles, a full length front zipper, and side hand pockets, plus a circular patch on the left chest. His hands are kept in the jacket pockets while walking. He pairs it with black track style slim jogger pants that have cargo pockets and small white accent tabs near the back pockets, along with bright red sneakers with white midsoles and white outsoles, creating a strong contrast between the dark outerwear and the red shoes.

A slim man with medium skin tone, long legs, and relatively narrow shoulders, wearing rectangular dark framed glasses and very short dark hair with closely shaved sides. He is dressed in a black bomber jacket left open over a dark long sleeve inner top, with the inner shirt showing a large light geometric chest graphic. He wears dark slim straight leg pants and dark shoes with lighter soles. The overall outfit is a dark layered look, with the open jacket and bold light chest graphic standing out most.

A woman with a medium regular build and a wide stride, wearing shoulder length dark brown hair loose and dark rectangular glasses. She wears a bright red hooded jacket zipped fully up, with the hood down, a high stand collar, and two zippered hand pockets that she keeps her hands in. A light colored earbud cable hangs down the front of the jacket. She also carries a bright blue backpack with dark shoulder straps, paired with light blue slim fit jeans and dark sneakers with white midsoles.

A slightly tall man with medium light skin, short dark hair in a slight side part with a bit of volume on top, mild crown thinning, and a slightly receding hairline at the temples. He has a broad face with full cheeks and a rounded jawline. His build is regular to solid, with moderately broad shoulders, a straight somewhat boxy torso, arms hanging close to his sides, relatively straight legs of moderate thickness, and an upper body that looks fuller than his lower legs. He wears business casual dark clothing: a dark blazer with lapels, a straight hem, and a single center back vent, layered over a gray V neck knit sweater and a light collared shirt with the collar points exposed at the neckline, along with dark loose straight trousers with mild bunching near the lower legs and dark dress shoes. He carries a large white paper shopping bag with yellow to gold side panels and thin handles. His walk has a compact carriage with limited arm spread and a slight outward foot angle.

A woman with medium skin tone and dark hair tied back in a low ponytail with a bright blue hair tie, a slim build, and a slightly broad hip to leg silhouette. She wears dark loose draped outerwear that extends to the upper thighs, with a blue lanyard and rectangular ID badge hanging at the front. She carries a large white shopping bag with short handles, with a thin light colored shoulder strap worn diagonally across the body and wears dark fitted legwear with dark footwear finished with thick white midsoles.

A slim man with light skin, short black hair with tapered sides and exposed ears, and moderately broad shoulders wears a light gray zip front jacket with a stand collar and ribbed cuffs and hem, light beige straight leg pants, and light colored shoes, and carries a large black backpack on one shoulder with a broad strap, a red side accent, and a small white logo near the lower part.

A man with medium skin tone, short black hair, and a high hairline, with a slim regular build and slightly broad shoulders. He wears a dark cap low over his face and a long black high collar coat with a zip front, creating an overall dark outfit. The coat falls to about upper thigh length and is paired with dark straight leg pants. He carries a soft, moderately full black backpack with shoulder straps and wears a dark shoulder bag on one shoulder. His footwear is dark athletic shoes with thick white soles, including a noticeably bright white heel area.

A middle aged to older man with medium skin tone, short hair mostly covered by a light gray flat cap, and an average to slightly tall frame with a regular build and relatively long legs. He wears a plain dark navy jacket with a simple front opening and no hood, dark straight leg trousers, and brown dark leather shoes. Around his neck is a long gray plaid scarf with fringe, wrapped and draped down the front in two long panels. The scarf is prominent, with dark horizontal stripe bands and thin red grid lines. He also carries a dark crossbody shoulder bag at the left hip, a medium sized rectangular soft bag with a wide dark strap running diagonally across his torso.

A stocky man with broad shoulders, a thick torso, medium to dark skin tone, a closely shaved head, and a broad rounded face wears business formal clothing: a dark suit jacket with lapels and an open front over a white collared dress shirt with the collar open at the neck and no tie, paired with dark straight leg suit trousers. He wears a blue neck lanyard with a rectangular ID badge at the chest. At his side he carries a large black shoulder bag worn crossbody, with a broad slightly trapezoidal structured body, a long shoulder strap with silver rectangular buckle hardware near the top, two short top handles attached by silver rings, and a small rectangular red and white logo patch on the front. He finishes the outfit with black dress shoes with a low heel and a rounded to slightly pointed toe.

A slim woman with a narrow frame, light skin, dark hair tied back, and dark rectangular glasses wears a long black quilted puffer coat that extends below the knees. The coat has horizontal padded sections, a front zipper, and a large fur trimmed hood framing the opening, with white triple stripe bands running along both sleeves from the shoulders to the forearms. A red inner top shows at the collar. She pairs it with black straight leg pants and dark athletic shoes with bright pink laces, with a light colored sock showing above one shoe.

A stocky man with broad shoulders, medium skin tone, a broad face with a rounded jawline, and short dark hair combed back with a side part, wearing a long black knee length puffer coat with a front zipper, dark straight leg pants, and black shoes. He has a bright blue lanyard at the neck with a rectangular white ID badge at the chest and carries a bright blue backpack with shoulder straps.

A short, stocky man with short dark hair brushed up into a slightly spiky top, a broad round face with full cheeks and a soft rounded jawline, and a compact build with medium broad slightly sloped shoulders, a short neck, a rounded midsection, thick upper arms and thighs, and relatively short legs. He wears a light gray puffer jacket with horizontal quilting, an attached black hood, and a front zipper over a red crew neck inner top, along with loose black pants and dark shoes with thick white midsoles. He carries a black backpack with shoulder straps and a white plastic shopping bag, and has a compact stance with feet fairly close and a short stride with the feet angled outward.

A short, stocky woman with a broad midsection, light skin, a smooth rounded face, a soft jawline, and short dark brown hair in a rounded bob, wearing oversized sunglasses. She wears a knee length black leather coat with a slightly glossy finish, a wide black fur collar, and matching fur cuffs, over a dark inner top with a bright blue lanyard and a white ID badge. She has loose dark cropped pants, dark heeled ankle boots, and carries a large reddish brown woven structured tote with two rounded top handles.

A slim man with slightly broad shoulders, long legs, light skin, and short dark hair wears dark framed rectangular glasses and a face mask. He has on a navy jacket with a front zipper closure, layered over a light gray hooded sweatshirt, with the gray hood sitting outside at the neck. His hands are placed in the jacket side pockets. He wears dark loose straight leg pants and white sneakers with red detailing at the heel. He carries a large black backpack with broad shoulder straps, and the backpack has a small light rectangular logo patch near the lower side.

A light skinned man with short dark hair, glasses, and a tapered hairline at the nape, with broad shoulders and a stocky regular build. He wears a teal hooded jacket with gray sleeves and darker contrasting sleeve panels, long sleeves with simple cuffs, a front zipper, and a gathered hem, with the hood lying flat against the upper back. He pairs it with dark blue straight leg jeans that show fading and whiskering around the seat and thighs, and dark athletic shoes with bright green accents and light colored soles.

A woman with a regular build and a curvy lower body wears a red baseball cap backward over medium length dark hair that falls to about shoulder length. She has on an olive bomber jacket with a front zipper over a white hooded sweatshirt, with the hood worn outside the jacket and marked by large black lettering. She pairs this with light gray sweatpants, pink socks, and white chunky sneakers, and carries a small yellow plastic shopping bag along with a small brown paper bag and a black smartphone in one hand.

A slim woman with long dark straight hair extending below a burgundy baseball cap with white lettering, wearing the hood up over the cap. She has a regular, narrow frame, with a slightly broader lower body silhouette created by a long black hooded puffer coat. The coat has a darker plain smooth upper section and a lower section with horizontal quilted puffer panels that extend to about the upper thigh. A long gray scarf is wrapped around her neck and drapes vertically down the chest. She wears dark pants and light colored sneakers with darker detailing, and carries both a light colored shoulder bag with a thin strap running across the body and a black backpack. Her outfit is overall dark with the lighter scarf, bag, and shoes standing out.

A man with medium skin tone, a wide jawline, and short dark thick slightly tousled hair with a rounded silhouette, wearing a bundled winter outfit with a regular build and a slightly broad midsection. He wears a dark long sleeve puffer jacket with side hand pockets and a centered front closure, dark loose straight leg pants, and dark footwear with light sole stripes. He is also shown with a light gray knit cap, a multicolored scarf at the neck, red gloves, and a white plastic shopping bag carried by hand.

A slightly tall stocky man with broad shoulders, a thick torso, medium skin tone, and short dark hair with close cropped sides wears a black quilted puffer jacket with dense horizontal baffles, partly unzipped at the neck over a gray crew neck T-shirt with a V shaped neckline opening, along with loose dark straight leg pants and black shoes with white midsoles, and carries a light colored handheld item.

A slim woman with a narrow frame, long dark hair worn down with a center part, and a white face mask wears a knee length light beige coat left open with lapels and a straight hem over a dark inner top and dark slim pants. She carries a medium sized dark crossbody bag with a rounded rectangular body on her left hip, holds a smartphone in one hand and wears dark sneakers with white toe and sole contrast. She is also seen in dark hooded outerwear.

A woman with light skin, a round face, a soft rounded jawline, and rectangular dark framed eyeglasses, wearing dark hair with a center part tied back. She has a regular build with a slightly broad torso and wears a high multicolored patterned neck scarf wrapped around her neck, a bright blue waist length puffer jacket with a front zipper closure and side hand pockets, dark gloves, and dark straight leg slim pants. She carries a structured black handbag with two handles by hand at her side and wears light tan to brown shoes.

A woman with light skin, an oval long face, a narrow jawline, and a high forehead, with dark straight shoulder length hair parted near the center and tucked behind the ears. She has a slim build and wears a dark monochrome outfit with a dark structured top featuring a symmetrical front closure and two vertical rows of gold tone buttons on the chest, paired with dark straight leg pants and dark shoes, and carries a large black handbag by hand at her side.

A man with short dark hair, light skin tone, and a medium regular build wears a dark green hooded jacket with an attached hood down, layered over a dark inner collar. He has on light blue straight leg jeans with back patch pockets and dark shoes with white midsoles. A large bright blue backpack with black shoulder straps, orange trim, and orange vertical zipper lines on the back panel, plus two black vertical compression straps and black dangling strap ends near the lower sides is especially noticeable.

A woman with dark long hair showing a reddish tint under a light gray bucket hat, with a regular build and a slightly broader lower body outline created by heavy winter layering. She wears a long dark overcoat with a straight loose silhouette that falls below the knees, wrapped with a bulky light gray scarf draped down the front; the scarf has a large light check pattern and black and white patterned fringed ends. She carries a large glossy burgundy handbag at her side and wears a dark shoulder bag on one side. Her footwear includes dark ankle boots and black athletic shoes with white soles and a white toe area, completing a layered winter outfit.

A slim woman with relatively long legs, light skin, an oval face, and a slender jawline, wearing glasses and long dark brown hair worn loose in soft waves with a center part and curled lower lengths. She wears a light colored, white to off white knee length coat with a straight tailored shape, dark trim along the coat edges and pocket openings, dark edging on the upper chest pocket area, two large lower front patch pockets with dark trim, and a front closure marked by dark toggle style fasteners. She pairs it with black slim pants and black ankle boots with block heels, carries a black crossbody bag with a thin strap running diagonally across the body to the hip, and holds a red orange shopping bag by hand.

A slim man with light skin, short dark hair, narrow shoulders, and long legs, wearing a dark waist length black quilted puffer jacket with a high collar. He carries a medium black backpack with clear shoulder straps and wears slim straight leg dark jeans, and has black sneakers with white midsoles. His overall frame is narrow and lean, with the long legged proportions standing out beneath the fitted dark jacket and slim pants.

A slim woman with light skin, relatively long legs, dark rectangular glasses, and dark brown hair tied back in a low to mid height ponytail. She wears black leggings and black slip on flats with a small red detail at the toe, and carries a white tote bag at her side. Her main outerwear is a light beige hooded winter coat reaching mid thigh, with a large hood, a full length dark front zipper, diamond quilt stitching across the body and hood, side hand pockets, and a rounded hem that falls slightly longer in back. The coat looks loose and winter weight, and this person also appears in a light cream fuzzy mid length coat with a large fold over collar.

A man with medium skin tone, short dark hair cut close at the sides, broad shoulders, and a stocky build. He wears a dark gray padded puffer jacket with horizontal quilted baffles, a front zip closure, and a high stand collar, with a small round emblem patch on the left chest. A dark shirt shows underneath the jacket. He has on dark blue straight leg jeans and white athletic sneakers with dark detailing. He carries a black soft sided bag in his right hand, and the bag has a long loose strap hanging downward, while he also pulls a black rolling suitcase with red side panels.

A man with short black hair, black rectangular glasses, and a light skin tone, with a regular build, a bulky slightly broad upper body from his jacket, and relatively slim legs. He wears a light gray hooded puffer jacket with a dark navy panel across the upper chest and shoulders, a high zipped stand collar, and a front zipper closure. The jacket has a small white logo on the left chest, two large lower front patch pockets with flap covers, and a vertical side entry pocket opening above the left lower pocket. He also wears light beige khaki pants and light colored athletic shoes with white uppers and darker outsole sections. He carries a black backpack with two shoulder straps and holds a smartphone in one hand.

A light skinned man with short dark hair around the ears and nape, wearing a light tan baseball cap. He has a regular build with slightly broad shoulders and relatively long legs. He wears a black hooded jacket with a high collar and the loose hood resting at the back, burgundy straight leg pants, and brown shoes. He carries a medium sized brown leather shoulder bag with a soft rectangular body and a long strap, worn crossbody from the right shoulder to the left hip. The jacket also has a small white logo mark near the upper back right shoulder area.

A man with medium light skin, a rounded face, short dark hair with slight volume on top, and rectangular dark framed glasses, with a regular slightly stocky build. He wears a dark pullover hoodie with the hood down, ribbed cuffs and hem, and his hands in the front pocket area, carries a dark backpack with a shoulder strap, and has on light gray sweatpants with large vertical white DICKIES text on the left leg and dark athletic shoes with thick white midsoles and light accents.

A slightly tall, stocky man with a compact but solid frame, broad shoulders, a thick torso and midsection, relatively full hips and seat, and sturdy upper legs and calves. He has a broad round face with full cheeks, a neat low hairline, short straight black hair, and a light skin tone, and he wears rectangular eyeglasses. He is dressed in an overall dark outfit: a dark hooded jacket worn zipped in front, with a raised stand collar, over straight dark trousers. He carries a large black backpack with a rounded top, multiple zippered compartments, brown trim accents, and a small red logo patch near the lower area. His shoes are dark sneakers with white midsoles, and his posture shows a mild forward neck carriage with squared shoulders and slightly outward arm carriage.

A man with glasses, a broad rounded face, a soft jawline, and light skin tone, wearing medium length straight dark hair parted to the side and falling around the face. He has a regular build with slightly broad shoulders. He wears a long black overcoat reaching about the knees, with broad dark front panels and no zipper, over a black top that shows a light blue section at the collar and down the chest. He pairs it with dark straight leg trousers, brown leather shoes, and a black backpack worn on both shoulders, giving an overall dark clothing palette.

A man with light skin, a broad face, short black hair with a straight hairline and rounded crown, and rectangular dark framed glasses. He has a broad upper body, a stocky build, and relatively short legs. He wears a dark blue hooded jacket with lighter blue panels along the sides and sleeves, dark straight leg pants, and dark hiking shoes. He carries a large black backpack with a rounded top, moderately wide shoulder straps, multiple front zip compartments including two vertical zip compartments with curved seam lines, and a small light circular logo patch on the front, and he is holding a smartphone.

A man with a broad face, medium light skin tone, and dark rectangular glasses, with short black hair with fuller volume on top, closely trimmed at the sides, and slightly receding at the temples. He is average to slightly tall with a regular to stocky build, broad shoulders, and relatively thick legs. He wears a dark navy pullover hoodie with a large hood down, no front zipper, a front kangaroo pocket, and a large yellow chest graphic, with a white undershirt hem extending below the hoodie. He also wears khaki straight leg pants and black athletic sneakers with white midsoles and a white side logo. He carries a large light gray backpack with broad light shoulder straps, a black central back panel, a top carry handle, and a narrow vertical reflective strip near the lower back panel, and he keeps his hands in his pants pockets.

A woman with medium light skin, an oval face, a soft rounded jawline, and rectangular dark framed eyeglasses, wearing straight dark brown to black shoulder length hair parted near the center. She has a regular build with a softly broad overall frame, a relatively small head against the long coat silhouette, a long torso, and a fairly straight outline from the shoulders through the thighs, with the lower body looking slimmer than the upper body. She wears a light lavender gray knee length coat with a straight loose cut, wide notch lapels, a double breasted front with two rows of buttons, side hand pockets, turned back lighter cuffs, and a straight hem, and the coat is left open over a dark inner layer with a mustard yellow high neck top showing at the neckline. A brown crossbody bag with a dark strap runs diagonally across her chest and torso. She also wears blue jeans and dark ankle boots, and her arms stay fairly close to the body with a slight forward curved upper body posture.

A man with short straight dark hair and slightly tousled uneven bangs, a rounded face with a soft jawline, medium light skin, and a regular build with slightly broad shoulders, wearing a dark loose long sleeve zip jacket with red inner collar trim over a longer white underlayer that extends below the jacket hem, blue straight leg jeans, and dark shoes with white soles, carrying a red backpack with broad light shoulder straps and holding a small rectangular item in one hand.

A woman with medium warm skin, a slim face with a narrow jawline, and long straight dark hair worn loose past the shoulders with a side part. She has a narrow slim frame with relatively long legs. She wears a rust brown camel hooded coat reaching the upper thigh, with a large folded collar, long plain sleeves, and a dark top at the neckline, paired with light slim pants and brown low heel shoes. She carries a large white shoulder tote bag and a black rectangular handbag with short handles.

A slim woman with light skin, a narrow frame, and relatively long legs, with medium brown to auburn light brown hair tied in a mid to high ponytail and a slim face with a small pointed chin. She wears a light colored face mask, a dark oversized knee length coat with a loose fit, long sleeves with loose straight cuffs, large rectangular patch pockets on the lower front, and a hem that falls to mid thigh to knee length with a straight to slightly rounded back drop. She pairs it with black dark fitted leggings and tan lace up ankle boots with thicker soles, carries a phone and wears a bright pink soft unstructured backpack with two shoulder straps.

A slim man with light skin, a slim face, narrow shoulders, and long legs, wearing rectangular glasses and side parted medium length dark hair with slightly tousled bangs. He carries a black backpack and wears a black zip front puffer jacket with a raised stand collar, horizontal quilted body panels, and smoother sleeves, paired with dark straight leg pants and bright blue footwear with light soles.

A man with light skin, a medium face shape, and short dark straight hair parted to the side, with a full slightly rounded crown and rectangular eyeglasses. He has an average regular build with slightly broad shoulders and wears a dark office worker outfit: a black knee length structured coat that reads as a dark jacket with lapels and a raised stand collar, layered over a light blue collared shirt with a darker blue inner collar. He wears dark straight leg trousers and dark black shoes with light colored soles. He carries a black backpack, seen both on one shoulder and on both shoulders, with gray side panels, a rounded top, multiple zip compartments, a small light colored logo patch near the upper side, and a distinctive diagonal red accent stripe on the pocket.

A woman with light skin, dark framed glasses, and short dark hair in a smooth rounded bob with a side part and full bangs. She has a regular build with a fairly full midsection, a compact upper body, moderately short looking legs relative to the torso, and a slimmer lower body. She wears a dark cap, a yellow beige scarf wrapped at the neck, light gray open outerwear extending below the hips with a rounded hem, and a black knee length skirt with black leggings and black heeled boots. She carries a large light beige handbag and a red patterned shopping tote, and keeps her arms close to her sides with limited swing.

A woman with light skin, a slightly broad frame and regular build, and shoulder length dark auburn to reddish brown hair wears it side parted with long side swept bangs across part of the forehead. She has a softly oval face with full cheeks and a soft rounded jawline. She is shown in a dark monochrome outfit consisting of a long black coat and black slim fit pants with black ankle boots, with white earbud wires hanging down the neck and torso. She also carries a dark shoulder bag with floral decoration, and her arms are folded across the torso. Another supported outfit on the same woman is a light gray quilted puffer jacket with horizontal baffles on the sleeves and front, a front zipper, and a dark inner top showing at the collar and upper chest, worn with dark pants and dark athletic shoes with white midsoles; in that outfit she has a dark backpack with shoulder straps and keeps her hands in the jacket side pockets.

A young woman with medium to medium light skin, a full round face, and a soft broad jawline with a rounded chin. She has long straight dark hair, side parted and sweeping across the forehead, falling past the shoulders, with a slightly broad shoulder line and a regular build. She wears a bulky dark gray knee length hooded coat zipped up over a gray hooded sweatshirt with a color blocked gray torso and red long sleeves, and a light gray hood sitting at the neck. The sweatshirt has a ribbed striped waist hem with gray, white, and red bands, and the coat has a paw print motif near the lower front. She wears black slim pants, white socks, and black sneakers with thick white soles. She also carries a medium backpack with a black body, a lighter rectangular gray front section, dark side pockets, black shoulder straps, and bright green straps on the shoulders.

A man with short dark brown to black hair in a straight, neat short hairstyle with slight volume on top, medium light skin tone, and a fairly slim face with a narrow jawline. He has a regular build with a slightly broad upper body. He wears a dark gray to gray quilted puffer jacket with a hood, a central front zipper, and a padded hood resting at the back, along with black straight leg pants. He carries a large dark backpack on both shoulders; the backpack has a rounded top, a bulky main compartment, multiple zip compartments, broad light gray shoulder straps, a light colored patch near the lower part, and a long loose strap hanging from the bottom. He wears dark athletic shoes with thick white midsoles.

A man with short dark hair and a round face, built with a slightly broad frame and regular build. He wears a dark hooded jacket with an attached hood, a zip closed front, and long sleeves with plain cuffs, with a blue shirt hem extending below the jacket, straight cut blue jeans, and white sneakers marked by three dark side stripes. He also appears in a long dark overcoat paired with a dark scarf around the neck, a dark baseball cap, and a green backpack. The overall clothing palette stays dark on top with blue denim and white striped sneakers, and his broader shoulder line adds a clear body shape cue beyond the outfit.

A medium height woman of regular build with shoulder length dark hair worn down in a center part and dark framed eyeglasses, wearing a black mid thigh coat with a light fur trimmed collar, bare legs, and black ankle boots with block heels, and carrying a large teal blue shoulder tote bag with a broad strap; a short light beige lower garment appears under the coat.

A woman with a short straight vivid red chin length bob haircut wears a bright red scarf wrapped at the neck. She has a regular build with relatively slim legs. She is dressed in a dark knee length coat with a simple straight cut and long sleeves, light tan straight leg pants, and black pointed toe heeled ankle boots with a light sole edge. She carries a large neon green tote bag with white handles and wears a black leather backpack with shoulder straps and a rounded drawstring top.

A man with medium skin tone, a broad face, and a strong jawline, with short black hair brushed back from the forehead. He is average to slightly tall with broad shoulders and a stocky build. He wears dark overall clothing, including a long dark overcoat with a straight hem and a structured collar opening at the neck, dark straight leg loose trousers, and dark shoes. He carries a large dark bag at one side hanging low near the leg, holds a white rectangular paper item in one hand, and pulls a dark rolling suitcase.

A young woman with dark hair tied back, a slightly broad frame, and a regular build. She wears a black hooded long jacket and white athletic shoes with pink accents. She also carries a large cream tote bag at the side.

A slightly tall woman with a slim narrow frame, relatively narrow shoulders, long straight legs, light skin, a slim face with a narrow jawline, and shoulder length straight brown hair with a side part. She wears a hooded mid thigh parka with white drawstrings and the hood up, black straight leg pants, and dark athletic shoes with white soles. She carries a backpack with tan shoulder straps, a front zip pocket, and a circular patch, and walks with a long even stride and her head angled slightly down and forward.

A woman with light skin, a slightly broad frame, and shoulder length wavy brown hair parted to one side, with one ear showing, wears a bright red long sleeve top and loose black straight leg pants. A dark crossbody bag hangs at her left hip from a thin strap running from her right shoulder, and she wears red slip on shoes with white socks above them.

A woman with an oval face, a softly rounded jawline, medium skin tone, and dark rectangular eyeglasses, wearing dark hair pulled back from a side part. She has a regular build and wears a black open outerwear piece with bold white trim along the front opening, cuffs, hem, and the openings of two front patch pockets. A multicolored scarf in blue, purple, and pink tones is wrapped around her neck, and a light blue inner shirt extends below the black outerwear at the front. She wears a dark top with black pants and dark low heeled ankle boots. She also carries a shoulder bag on one shoulder, appearing as a black handbag with a light colored strap and gold hardware.

A slim woman with a narrow frame and light skin tone, wearing long dark brown wavy hair loose past her shoulders. She wears a light pink hooded coat that reaches the upper thigh and is left open, with two large front patch pockets where she places both hands. Under it is a white printed T-shirt with a black graphic at the chest. She also wears black slim pants and black sneakers with white midsoles. She carries a small light blue crossbody bag at the front/side and also has a bright pink backpack.

A man with medium light skin, a full rounded face, and a soft rounded jawline. He has short thick dark brown hair with slight volume, brushed up and back from the forehead. His build reads slim to average with a relatively straight torso, moderately narrow shoulders, and somewhat short legs with a slim lower body line. He wears a black jacket with a stand collar and front button closure over a dark red top, paired with warm brown straight leg trousers. He carries a brown crossbody messenger bag with a shoulder strap across the body, and another image set also shows a large teal shoulder bag. His footwear is orange athletic shoes with white side stripes and thick white soles. His posture is relaxed, with a slight forward head inclination and a mild inward crossing of the legs while walking.

A light skinned man with short dark hair combed back with a slight side part, a smooth rounded hairline, and ears showing through the short side hair. He has a slim regular build with medium shoulder width and relatively slim legs. He wears a black quilted puffer jacket with horizontal quilted baffles across the sleeves and upper body, paired with dark slim jeans and a tan and olive camouflage hood around the neck. A white earbud cable hangs from the jacket. He carries a large dark leather backpack with a rounded top and wide shoulder straps; the backpack has dark blue side panels, a darker central front panel, and a front zip pocket positioned low on the front. He wears white sneakers with dark side stripes.

A young woman with round face with soft full cheeks and a broad forehead, dark center parted hair tied in a high ponytail, and slightly broad shoulders with relatively slim legs. She wears a dark hooded zip up jacket with a high collar and vertical chest zipper pocket.

A man with medium skin tone, a rounded face, and a broad jawline wears a black baseball cap low over short dark hair. He has a broad shoulder frame and a compact, sturdy, stocky build, with a slightly short stature, a relatively long torso, moderately short legs, and full hips and upper legs that give him a bottom heavy lower body proportion. He wears a black waist length zip up jacket with a high stand collar, darker central panels, and contrasting olive brown side panels, paired with light blue jeans in a straight to slightly relaxed fit and dark shoes. He carries a black backpack on both shoulders with multiple compartments and small red accent points, and he also carries a light gray shopping bag. His arm carriage sits slightly outward, and his step placement is somewhat wide with a regular walking stride.

A woman with side parted dark hair pulled back and secured with a hair clip wears a white face mask. She has a regular build with a slightly broad shoulder line.
